author: SegmentLinking
body:
This PR addresses the UBSAN problems reported in #50351. I switched from `memcpy` and `memset` to to `copy_n` and `fill_n`, which can handle zero-sized operations more gracefully, and also they make the code a bit clearer.

c.c. @slava77
title: LST: fix problems with LSTPrepareInput reported by UBSAN
